# Supported Versions

We are continuously releasing new versions of the Intercom Cordova plugin with bug fixes and new features. We encourage all customers to keep up to date with the latest version. A list of all our release can be found on our [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/intercom/intercom-cordova/releases) page.

#### Summary of required versions of libararies and SDKs.

| Name | Required Version |
|  --- | --- |
| cordova | 12.0.0 |
| cordova-android | 13.0.0 |
| cordova-ios | 7.1.0 |
| iOS SDK | 15.0.0 |
| Android SDK | 34 |
